name: Hunter's Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1. Chicken, cut into serving-size pieces (I use skinned chicken breasts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a deep frying pan.
2. Fry garlic until golden, then remove from the pan.
3. Add chicken, rosemary, and salt to the pan. Brown the chicken, turning it until deeply browned.
4. Add white wine vinegar and quickly cover the pan. Let sizzling stop.
5. Add dry white wine and cook on high heat until it evaporates.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for about 15 minutes.
7. Add sliced mushrooms and artichoke hearts to the pan.
8. Cook until the chicken and mushrooms are tender. Remove chicken to a platter.
9. With a wooden spoon, scrape the sides and bottom of the pan to retrieve any browned bits. Add about a tablespoon of water to the juices in the pan.
10. Turn up the heat and continue scraping until the sauce turns amber.
11. Pour the sauce over the chicken and serve with good Italian bread.
